meaning: n.[生化]泰乐菌素(一种抗菌素,常用作兽药或饲料添加剂)
examples: Tilmicosin-resistant S6 and BG44T showed cross-resistance to erythromycin, tylosin and lincomycin.
The clinical efficacy of apramycin sulfate and tylosin tartrate injection on diarrhea in calves was (observed) in 83 calves.
The industrial strain BIB0830 of Streptomyces thermotolerans can produce acetyl-isovaleryl tylosin by bioconversion using tylosin as a processor.
